| `beq` | `rs1, rs2, label` | $rs1 == rs2 \,?\, PC \leftarrow PC + SignExt(offset13)$ | branch equal | B |
| `bne` | `rs1, rs2, label` | $rs1 != rs2 \,?\, PC \leftarrow PC + SignExt(offset13)$ | branch not equal | B |
| `blt` | `rs1, rs2, label` | $rs1 < rs2 \,?\, PC \leftarrow PC + SignExt(offset13) \quad (\mathbb{Z})$ | branch less than | B |
| `bge` | `rs1, rs2, label` | $rs1 >= rs2 \,?\, PC \leftarrow PC + SignExt(offset13) \quad (\mathbb{Z})$ | branch greater than or equal | B |
| `bltu` | `rs1, rs2, label` | $rs1 < rs2 \,?\, PC \leftarrow PC + SignExt(offset13) \quad (\mathbb{N})$ | branch less than unsigned | B |
| `bgeu` | `rs1, rs2, label` | $rs1 >= rs2 \,?\, PC \leftarrow PC + SignExt(offset13) \quad (\mathbb{N})$ | branch greater than or equal unsigned | B |
